report.summary: Standup v15 Apr 3: BTC ~$66,650 (down ~$250 from v14), ETH ~$2,048 (-0.5%), F&G holds 9 (extreme fear). Since v14: 4 agents ran — build-v13 added LayerZero + Smart Contract Security guides (98 total learn pages, +2), community-v11 drafted tweets #460-464 + Newsletter v45 + 3 social cards, design-v2 fixed Drift/Polkadot OG images, eod-v7 closed cycle. 58 total runs today = ~$5,306 human-equiv. Deploy debt at 25th escalation.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v14 → v15): 4 agents ran — build (1), community (1), design (1), eod (1). Build-v13 produced 2 new learn guides: LayerZero Omnichain Interoperability Protocol (952 lines) and Smart Contract Security Audits & DeFi Safety (875 lines). Learn pages now 98 (+2 from v14's 96). Uncommitted files now 91 (+9 from v14's 82).

MARKET UPDATE — BTC ~$66,650 (down ~$250 from v14): BTC slipped from v14's ~$66,900 to ~$66,650. Opened at $66,888 Friday, 1.7% below Thursday's $68,078. ETH at ~$2,048, down from v14's $2,050 (-0.1%). Crypto market cap $2.38T, down 2.4% in 24h. Good Friday — traditional markets closed.

F&G INDEX: 9 — Extreme Fear, unchanged from v14. Sub-10 sustained 4+ consecutive days — longest extreme-fear trough since Terra-Luna June 2022. Historical sub-10 median returns: 30d +18%, 90d +72%. $316B stablecoin ATH = record dry powder for recovery.

MACRO CONTEXT: Iran war overhang from Trump's Wednesday address continues weighing on risk assets. Both crypto and equities sold off. Traders in risk-off mode with traditional markets closed for Good Friday. Weekend liquidity likely thin — potential for volatility.

CONTENT ON DISK: 98 learn page dirs in Degen0x workspace (+2 from v14). 91 uncommitted files in cryptodegen (+9 from v14). Build velocity resumed this cycle with 2 new guides — LayerZero and Smart Contract Security.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: LAST CYCLE ACTIVITY (v14 → v15): 4 agent runs — build-v13 (LayerZero + Smart Contract Security guides), community-v11 (tweets #460-464, Newsletter v45, 3 social cards), design-v2 (fixed Drift Protocol + Polkadot OG images, added StructuredData + BackToTop components, fixed mobile table overflow on Stablecoin Payments), eod-v7 (cycle close).
TODAY'S FULL AGENT ACTIVITY: 58 agent runs across 6 types — standup×15 ($675), build×13 ($3,029), design×10 ($600), community×11 ($451), eod×7 ($441), publish×2 ($110). Total human-equiv: $5,306.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (25TH CONSECUTIVE ESCALATION): Deploy debt remains CRITICAL. 98 learn pages in Degen0x workspace. 91 uncommitted files in cryptodegen. Content pipeline produced 2 more guides this cycle, deploying 0. F&G at 9 = users searching for exactly this content NOW. x402 Protocol guide now 36h+ old — competitors indexing. Smart Contract Security guide is peak relevance given DRIFT protocol attack news. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED.
P1 — OG IMAGE PROGRESS: Design-v2 fixed Drift Protocol and Polkadot OG images. Remaining missing: AI Agents, Cross-Chain Bridges, x402 Protocol, Crypto ETFs (4 pages).
P2 — PHANTOM PUBLISHED PAGES: 646 published slugs vs ~421 page.tsx on disk. Potential 404s unchanged.
P3 — API RESILIENCE: 0/6 public routes with rate limiting. 1/6 with fallback data. Unchanged 25+ cycles.
P4 — 464 tweets drafted (+5 this cycle), 45 newsletters (+1), 94+ social cards (+3) — all queued for post-deploy social launch.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0 — 25TH ESCALATION): 58 agent runs today = $5,306 human-equiv invested with zero user-facing output. Time-sensitive pieces aging: x402 Protocol (36h+ since Foundation launch — competitors indexing), Crypto ETFs (Morgan Stanley fee war peaking), Smart Contract Security (DRIFT protocol attack driving search spikes NOW). Every hour of delay = lost first-mover advantage. Deploy urgency: MAXIMUM.

PRIORITY 2 — OG IMAGE BATCH: 4 pages still missing OG images (AI Agents, Cross-Chain Bridges, x402, Crypto ETFs). Design fixed 2 this cycle (Drift, Polkadot) — maintain momentum and clear remaining 4 so next deploy batch ships complete.

PRIORITY 3 — EXTREME FEAR CONTENT WINDOW: F&G at 9 for 4+ consecutive days — historically a once-every-2-years signal. Smart Contract Security guide landed perfectly with DRIFT attack news. Next build should target 'crypto market crash recovery' and 'should I buy crypto now' — high-intent queries spiking during sustained fear. Window closes when sentiment lifts.
